sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this simulation game

special_mechanics.name: Ant Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a single yellow ant at a time with ability to switch control between colony members. Direct manipulation of individual ant movement in top-down and side-view perspectives.

special_mechanics.name: Tunneling/Digging
special_mechanics.description: Yellow ant can dig new tunnels underground and expand colony network. Movement through underground side-view passages.

special_mechanics.name: Pheromone Trail System
special_mechanics.description: Yellow ant leaves pheromone trails to destinations (food, enemy colonies). Trails can be washed away by rain hazard.

special_mechanics.name: Object Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Yellow ant can pick up food and pebbles, engage in trophallaxis (regurgitated food exchange), and attack enemies.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative/Empirical. SimAnt is a life simulation strategy game, not an action platformer. No precise movement physics parameters are documented in available sources. Game focuses on ant colony simulation mechanics rather than character movement physics. Movement is simulation-driven rather than physics-driven.
